message:
✨ Add preview warmup delay and hide closed request notifications (#1227)

- Add 30s warmup delay before showing "Preview Available" link to allow
  Netlify routes to come online after deployment succeeds
- Backend returns ready_at timestamp from GitHub deployment status
- Frontend shows "Preview warming up..." countdown during warmup period
- Filter out notifications for closed requests from Activity tab
- Compute unread count excluding closed request notifications

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
